15-Minute Site Energy Intensity: First Week of Each Quarter

Modeled commercial building energy use (kWh per 1,000 sq ft per 15-min interval) for three U.S. counties. Each panel shows one county. Solid lines = Baseline (existing stock); dotted lines = Package 3 efficiency measures. Select a building type and toggle counties or scenarios below.

Building Type
Counties
Scenario

Source: NREL End-Use Load Profiles for the U.S. Building Stock (ComStock, 2018 AMY weather year). Values represent 15-min aggregate site energy intensity (kWh / 1,000 sq ft) normalised by floor_area_represented across all ComStock model buildings of the selected type within each county. Upgrade 36 = Package 3 efficiency measure bundle. First week of each quarter: Jan 1–7, Apr 1–7, Jul 1–7, Oct 1–7.
Note: Washtenaw Co, MI does not include a Hospital building type in this dataset. Values are modeled outputs, not measured.
